nasb.text: how he entered the house of God, and took and ate the consecrated bread which is not lawful for any to eat except the priests alone, and gave it to his companions?”

esv.text: how he entered the house of God and took and ate the bread of the Presence, which is not lawful for any but the priests to eat, and also gave it to those with him?”

cnv.text: 他不是進了　神的殿，吃了陳設餅，也給跟他在一起的人吃嗎？這餅除了祭司以外，別的人是不可以吃的。”

ccb.text: 他进入上帝的殿，拿了献给上帝的供饼。这饼只有祭司才可以吃，大卫不但自己吃了，还分给他的部下吃。”

csbs.text: 他怎样进了神的殿，拿了陈设饼吃，还分给与他在一起的人呢？这饼除了祭司一个人之外，谁都不可以吃。”
